title: Salons & Spas
metaTitle: Billing, Staff & Stock Software for Salons & Spas · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free billing plus product inventory, staff payroll and customer history for salons, spas and clinics. Bill services fast, track product use, pay staff. Works worldwide.
keywords: salon software, spa billing, salon erp, beauty business software, staff commission, product inventory salon, customer history
heroTitle: Bill services fast, keep clients close
heroSubtitle: Ring up services and retail in seconds, track the products you use, and pay staff with commission worked out for you. Paper & Pen runs the front desk, the stock room and the books together.

features.title: Fast billing
features.desc: Add services and retail products, take payment and share a receipt in seconds.

features.title: Customer history
features.desc: Keep contact details and past visits so every client feels remembered.

features.title: Product stock
features.desc: Track retail and back-bar products by unit and batch, with low-stock alerts.

features.title: Staff & commission
features.desc: Run payroll and calculate staff commission on services and retail sales.

features.title: WhatsApp receipts
features.desc: Send receipts and follow-ups to clients on WhatsApp in a tap.

features.title: Service reports
features.desc: See top services, busy hours and revenue by staff member or branch.

sections.title: Billing your clients will appreciate
sections.body: Add the services and any retail products to a bill, apply a discount or package, take payment and share a clean receipt on WhatsApp before the client has left the chair. Customer details and visit history sit on the same screen, so the team can greet regulars by name and recommend the right follow-up.
items: Services and retail on one bill
Client contact and visit history at hand

sections.title: Products tracked, staff paid right
sections.body: Back-bar product walks out the door if no one is watching. Paper & Pen tracks retail and professional products by unit and batch, flags low stock, and links use to sales. Run payroll for your team and let the system work out commission on the services and retail they sell. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and ready for USD, EUR or any market and tax rate.
items: Retail and back-bar stock with alerts
Any currency, any tax rate, VAT ready

faqs.q: Can I bill services and retail products together?
faqs.a: Yes. Add any mix of services and retail products to one bill, apply discounts or packages, take payment and share a receipt instantly.
Yes. The HR and Payroll module can work out commission on the services and retail each staff member sells, and run their payroll.
Yes. Store contact details and past visits so your team can recognise regulars and recommend the right follow-up service.
Yes. Track retail and back-bar products by unit and batch, with low-stock alerts, using the Inventory module.

faqs.q: Is billing free for a salon?
faqs.a: Sales and Invoicing, including receipts and customer records, is free forever. Add Inventory and HR/Payroll for stock and commission.

ctaTitle: Run the salon, not the paperwork
ctaSub: Start free with service billing and client records, then add Inventory and Payroll for stock and commission.
